zThrice went on a date with me last week. He took me out to McDonald's. He said he was in a hurry to get to the good part of the date, so I was fine with it. We quickly headed back to his place. OhShit it was finally happening. He took me out back and showed me his heat pump. That heat pump was HUGE. We then spent the next 5 hours inspecting his entire HVAC system. Best date of my life. frfr
